case_title: FERRANDO, ANTHONY JR. VS PALMER, ARNOLD GOLF MANG/DBA HARDING PARK GOLF/COU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,030.00 FILED BY FERRANDO, ANTHONY JR. AS TO DEFENDANT PALMER, ARNOLD GOLF MANG/DBA HARDING PARK GOLF/COU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
